hooks.command: MARKER="/tmp/.travel_scrapping_agents_${PPID}"; if [ ! -f "$MARKER" ]; then touch "$MARKER"; rtk read -l aggressive /home/yaco/github/travel-scrapping/AGENTS.md; fi

case "${CLAUDE_FILE_PATH}" in
  *AGENTS.md)
    rtk test .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_strategy_docs.py 2>&1 || true
    ;;
  */docs/strategy/*.md|*/docs/tasks/*.md|*/TODO.md)
    rtk test .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_strategy_docs.py 2>&1 || true
    ;;
esac
